author: WSvX
content:
## Handoff: Per-Widget Calendar Filtering — Session 6 (2026-04-25)

**Status**: 3-state calendar picker fix complete. Build verified. Branch history cleaned.

### Session 6 Work

Completed crosslink #27, #28, #29, #30, #31 (3-state calendar picker bug chain):

| Issue | Title | Fix |
|---|---|---|
| #29 | Add string resource for zero-calendars label | Added `widget_calendars_selected_none` to strings.xml |
| #27 | Fix saveConfig to preserve explicit-zero | Save `null` only when picker never opened; snip `""` for explicit-zero |
| #28 | Fix updateCalendarPickerLabel for 3-state | 3-state: null→"All calendars", ""→"No calendars selected", ids→"N selected" |
| #30 | Verify widget render path handles empty-string | Fixed adapter: null intent extra→global filter, ""→emptyList (show nothing). Fixed provider to only set extra when non-null |
| #31 | Show warning when zero calendars selected | Wired `calendar_picker_warning_message` visibility in `updateCalendarPickerLabel()` |

Also fixed a **render-path bug** discovered during #30 verification: `EventListWidgetAdapter` was collapsing both `null` and `""` into `null` override (showing all events for explicit-zero). Fixed to map `""` → `emptyList()` (show nothing).

### Branch History Cleanup

- Removed `CHANGELOG.md` from commit 838d5aa9b (not part of this feature)
- Removed `values-en-rGB` rename from commit 247ec9bca (unrelated)
- Combined `247ec9bca` + `25b8a092c` into single commit `15c170ef6` with conventional commit message

### Final Branch (6 commits)

```
15c170ef6 feat(widget): add 3-state calendar picker to widget config
f5e95d892 fix(widget): pre-check all calendars when default selection is used
1c136aede chore: add Room schema 12.json
4e4089a2e feat(widget): implement per-widget calendar filtering for event list widget
1bb0fd976 feat(widget): add settings icon drawable and calendar picker strings
b8cebd501 feat(widget): add calendars column and helpers to Widget model
```

### 3-State Behavior

| DB `calendars` | `isCalendarsConfigured()` | Config Label | Widget Renders |
|---|---|---|---|
| `null` (default) | false | "All calendars selected" | Global filter events |
| `""` (explicit none) | true | "No calendars selected" + warning | No events |
| `"1,2,3"` | true | "3 calendars selected" | Filtered to those calendars |

### Remaining Open Issues (13)

| Priority | ID | Title |
|---|---|---|
| HIGH | #15 | Add missing database indexes on Event entity |
| HIGH | #16 | Fix N+1 query in EventsHelper.getEventsSync |
| HIGH | #17 | Replace notifyDataSetChanged with DiffUtil |
| LOW | #18–#26 | Performance/minor refactors |

### Next Steps

1. Performance issues (#15, #16, #17) — independent of widget work
2. Manual testing per design doc section 5.5
3. Final lint + build before upstream PR
4. Uncommitted in working tree: `ic_launcher_background.xml` tweak, debug `strings.xml (en-rGB)` deletion — decide whether to include or discard

### Skills Loaded
- sdd-verify
- spec-driven-development
- verification-before-completion
